reference: I don't think your fiancé's cancer has resurfaced within such a short time. This may be related to an infection, as he only completed the transplant two weeks ago. A trial of antibiotics can be considered. If symptoms persist, it would be better to investigate for recurrence of the disease.
text: I don't think your fiance's cancer has re surfaced within such a short time. This may be related to an infection, as he only completed the transplant two weeks ago. A trial of antibiotics can be considered. If symptoms persist, it would be better to investigate a recurrence of the disease.
